ingredients_text:
Reon con motionsense responde directamente ai neitint
Rexon com motionsense esponde diretamente at noi
b da. Nessa protecar mais duradowa conta a tasa
NGREDIENTES: UTANE IS08UTANE PROPANE
STARCH OCTENYSUCOINATE, MALTODEXTIN YORU
CHOLOMETHICONE PPS-14 BUTL ETHER AFM DSTARD
pcCPRIC TRIYCERDE ORATED SAICA GELATN CROSSP22 MER AU UE
PLE CARONATE, BE BENATE, BENZ SALACYLATE, QONELLO, RA
ENTINA FAICAD POR IMEVR DE ARCENTINA SA ALFN OD
SAS 1998 S 730 INPORTADO POR/MPORTED R
E SIDENTS AISCEUNO KUBITSCHEK 1309 SAI
e NDAS INDUSTRIAS 315, VINEDOSPEU MN
14 APREFEIT LAVO GOMEZ 3701, POSO A
STRBUIDO PON DISTHEITED BY ALNS
0CNP 81.068 2760307 40 INLMG)
NLVER URUGUAY SCCSA CNO CAOS
A, RIC R0023081-7, RD SALADO N'8YR
R E 9-7800 4L , MSPYBS N 240-414C
URCTURERAS DE RL ON CL W0 2 COL RANCHO SANTO DOMINA, CP L
E DISTRIBUIDO POR UNL D
